---
title: "As bad as humans: Can machine learning text analysis be used for framing analysis"
author: "Djouvas, C., Manavopoulos, V., and Mendez, F."
date: 2023-01-01
description: "17th European Consortium of Political Research (ECPR 2023), Prague"
categories: [Public Opinion and Argument Mining]
image: images_publications/conference.png
---
